flag_script_0: "Once this war is over, I'm going back home to get married (Kono tatakai ga owattara, kokyō ni kaette kekkon suru nda)"
flag_script_1: "After this battle, drinks are on me!"
flag_script_2: Don't worry! We've still got plenty of ammo!
flag_script_3: "Right now, I'm invincible! (Ima no ore wa, makeru ki ga shinee!)"
flag_script_4: This is a safe house, right?
flag_script_5:
"D-do you want money?! I'll give you anything!
I can give you even more money!"
flag_script_6: "Once this mission is done, I'm getting married."
flag_script_7: "One last job, then I'm going straight."
flag_script_8: "I really want to try that one more time..."
flag_script_9: "I'm not afraid of anything anymore (Mō nani mo kowakunai)"
flag_script_12: "I just hope you never forget me."
flag_script_13: "I just want to be with you forever."
flag_script_14: "Ahh... why am I remembering such pointless things at a time like this?"
flag_script_18: "When this is all over, there's something I want to tell you!"
flag_script_20: "Remember to give it back when everything's over."
flag_script_22: "Once this job is done, let's live together, just the two of us!" (Kono shigoto ga owattara futari de kurasō)
flag_script_23: "The three of us will be together forever!"
flag_script_24: "This is a photo of my daughter. Cute, right?"
flag_script_25: "Please tell him/her that I will always love him/her."
flag_script_26: "Listen—don't move from here until I get back! (Iika, ore ga kaette kuru made koko o ugokun janai zo)"
flag_script_27: "Be a good kid and wait for me to come back."
flag_script_28: "I'll be right back (Saki ni itte, sugu kaeru kara)"
flag_script_31: "No way all of us can't take down one guy!"
flag_script_34: "Damn it! You'll pay for this! (runs away)"
flag_script_35: "They won't find us if we hide here."
flag_script_37: "Damn it! So that's what was going on!"
flag_script_38: "Well, there'll be plenty of chances to ask later anyway."
flag_script_39: "Your life is already flickering like a candle in the wind."
flag_script_40: "No cards in hand, nothing on the field—and you still think you can win?"
flag_script_41: "We've run far enough. We should be fine."
flag_script_42: "I'm not afraid of anything anymore (Mō nani mo kowakunai)"
flag_script_43: "What is this thing? Never seen it before (Nanda kono XXX, mita koto nai na)"
flag_script_44: "What was that noise...? I'll go check (Nani no oto da? Chotto mite kuru)"
flag_script_45: "Was that my imagination? Maybe I saw wrong."
flag_script_47: "In twenty years, I'll be a man again!"
flag_script_48: "May fortune favor our lord in battle."
flag_script_49: "The pay for this job is unlike anything before (Kondo no shigoto de matomatta kane ga hairu nda)"
flag_script_50: "I'm not staying with a murderer in the room! I'm going back to my own room! (Kono naka ni satsujinsha ga iru kamoshirenai noni, issho ni irareru ka! Ore wa jibun no heya ni modoru zo!)"
flag_script_51: "Actually, I know the truth... the culprit is..."
flag_script_53: "My lord! Leave this to me—please get out of here!"
flag_script_54: "This is our school's ultimate secret technique. I'll only show this move once—watch closely!"
flag_script_56: "No one has ever broken this technique of mine."
flag_script_57: "It's fine if we kill them, right?"
flag_script_58: "Watch me dive them under the tower!"
flag_script_60: "No need for my lord to lift a finger. Leave it to me."
flag_script_62: "The mastermind pulling all the strings is actually—!"
flag_script_63: "I've never seen you before. Who are you?"
flag_script_65: "My dad is... just try it if you've got the guts..."
flag_script_69: "I'll only show this move once—watch closely!"
flag_script_73: "Beat him up. If anything happens, I'll take responsibility."
flag_script_76: "Beat you two, and the rest will be easy."
flag_script_77: "I'll become stronger than anyone and protect you for life."
flag_script_78: "Can you take over here? This kid says they like you too."
flag_script_80: "Come, let's fight to the end—our final battle!!"
flag_script_81: "You must be a clone or something like that."
flag_script_82: "Thank you. You made me feel like I wasn't alone."
flag_script_84: "This mission is a cakewalk compared to training!"
flag_script_86: "Hahaha, another lucky day—I cheated death again!"
flag_script_88: "Temples, idols—watch me tear them all down!"
flag_script_89: "Ghosts? That's just stuff to scare kids."
flag_script_90: "This has been tested over and over—nothing can go wrong."
flag_script_93:
"Next I'll explain the rules."
"Enough of this prank show—I'm leaving."
flag_script_98: "Big deal, but it's got nothing to do with us. lol"
flag_script_99: "When I get back, I'll pay you back tenfold!"
flag_script_100: "A huge shadow on radar!" "Radar must be broken."
flag_script_101: "Beautiful weather today—perfect day to set sail!"
flag_script_102: "Got bitten by a monster, but it's just a flesh wound!"
flag_script_103: "Captain, I see a figure here..." "Hello? What did you say?" "..."
flag_script_105: "Senpai will hold him off—don't worry, go!"
flag_script_106: "I'm going to tell her how I feel after five years!"
flag_script_108: "As long as they're happy, I truly wish them well."
flag_script_109: "I can make good use of this."
flag_script_117: "No one can beat me while my BGM is playing."
flag_script_118: "You still have your life, don't you?"
flag_script_127: "Scream all you want—no one's coming to save you."
